plugin.name: Clipboard Manager
plugin.description: A clipboard workspace with persistent history, pinned snippets, categories, and multi-format capture.
title: Clipboard Manager
description: Capture plain text, rich text, copied files, and images. Pin important snippets, organize them into categories, and restore the original format back to the clipboard.
summary.empty: Select a clipboard item to inspect and act on it.
preview.text.placeholder: Clipboard content preview will appear here.
meta.label: Label
log.restored: Clipboard item restored to the system clipboard.
dialog.label.title: Set Label
dialog.category.title: Set Category
dialog.clear.title: Clear Clipboard History
dialog.clear.prompt: Delete all non-pinned clipboard entries from the local history database?
log.cleared: Clipboard history cleared. Pinned entries were preserved.
manager.labels.note: Create reusable labels for clipboard items.
manager.categories.note: Create reusable categories for pinned snippets and saved clipboard entries.
dialog.delete.title: Delete
header.label: Label
